summary: Testing search navigation fixes for genre and profile results. Code review shows handleItemPress is correctly implemented. UI testing via Playwright was limited due to React Native Web's TouchableOpacity not exposing data-testid attributes and click events not properly propagating in web preview.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity in search.tsx (line 290) are not rendered to DOM in React Native Web, making automated testing difficult

integration_issues.issue: Unable to verify navigation fix via Playwright. When clicking 'Rock' text, navigation went to /discover?genre=rock instead of /genre-detail. This may indicate another click handler is intercepting, or the click isn't reaching the TouchableOpacity onPress handler.
integration_issues.evidence: URL after click: /discover?genre=rock instead of expected /genre-detail?slug=rock&name=Rock

integration_issues.issue: Could not test profile navigation as clicks on search results don't properly trigger the onPress handler in web preview
integration_issues.evidence: Unable to navigate to user-profile page from search results

handleItemPress_implementation.analysis: handleItemPress correctly navigates to /genre-detail with slug and name params for genres, and /user-profile with userId, userName, userAvatar params for profiles. The code logic is correct.

renderResultCard_implementation.analysis: TouchableOpacity has correct onPress handler calling handleItemPress(item). Also has nested TouchableOpacity for play/chevron button that also calls handleItemPress.

search_for_genre.evidence: Search for 'rock' returns 31 combined results: 30 stations, 3 genres (1 matching 'Rock'), 70 profiles

genre_filter.evidence: Clicking Genres filter shows Rock genre with 2676 Stations

genre_click_navigation.evidence: Click on Rock genre in search results went to /discover?genre=rock instead of /genre-detail. Could be: (1) another handler intercepting, (2) web preview issue, (3) CSS z-index issue

profile_click_navigation.evidence: Could not search for profiles and click on them due to same web click propagation issues

action_items: VERIFY FIX: The handleItemPress code looks correct in search.tsx. Test navigation manually on mobile device or simulator to confirm fix works on native platforms.
INVESTIGATE: Why clicking 'Rock' text navigates to /discover?genre=rock - check if there's a Link component or other handler intercepting clicks in the DOM
CONSIDER: Add console.log inside handleItemPress to verify it's being called when items are clicked on web
WEB TESTING: data-testid attributes on TouchableOpacity are not rendered in React Native Web DOM - consider using testID prop instead for web compatibility
critical_code_review_comments: handleItemPress implementation is correct per the bug fix requirements
search.tsx line 239-242: Genre navigation pushes to /genre-detail with slug and name - CORRECT
search.tsx line 244-250: Profile navigation pushes to /user-profile with userId, userName, userAvatar - CORRECT
data-testid on TouchableOpacity (line 290) doesn't render to DOM in React Native Web - limits testability

success_rate.frontend: 40% - Search works, navigation testing inconclusive due to web platform limitations

context_for_next_testing_agent: handleItemPress code in search.tsx looks correct. The bug fix has been implemented but could not be fully verified via Playwright due to React Native Web's TouchableOpacity event handling differences. When clicking 'Rock' text in search results, it navigated to /discover instead of /genre-detail - this needs investigation. Suggest testing on native mobile platform or adding console.log to handleItemPress to verify it's being called.

rca_of_the_issue.original_bug: Search results for genres navigate to wrong page (/discover instead of /genre-detail), profiles only console.log (do nothing)
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: handleItemPress updated in search.tsx to use router.push for /genre-detail and /user-profile with correct params
rca_of_the_issue.verification_status: CODE LOOKS CORRECT but automated web testing shows navigation to /discover - may be web-specific issue or click being intercepted
rca_of_the_issue.recommendation: Test on native mobile device/simulator to confirm fix works, investigate why web clicks may be intercepted
